dispatch_policy: Single project-level character board. Prefer direct parent image generation; if moved to background execution, use one Codex thread for the exact output path below.

jobs.thread_title: 断航故土 赫连雪岱高级熊族护卫多状态角色板 v03
jobs.worker_instruction: Use the image prompt exactly. Generate Helian Xuedai as a high-ranking white-bear-clan guard with a human round face, bear ears, and bear-clan facial markings. Do not generate a bear-face beast head, Frosthoof deer guard, low-ranking tribesperson, or shaman. Save the final PNG to the expected output path. Keep rejected attempts in history.
